stories.title: DeepSeek v4
stories.author: impact_sy
stories.one_line_summary: DeepSeek released V4-Pro (1.6T total / 49B active params) and V4-Flash (284B / 13B active) with 1M context default, weights on HuggingFace under open license.
stories.comment_highlight: nthypes: Model was released and it's amazing. Frontier level (better than Opus 4.6) at a fraction of the cost.

stories.title: Google plans to invest up to $40B in Anthropic
stories.author: elffjs
stories.one_line_summary: Google commits $10B now at $350B Anthropic valuation plus $30B if performance targets are met, structured largely as cloud credits in exchange for equity.
stories.comment_highlight: htrp: How much of this goes back to Google as cloud spend?

stories.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro in the API
stories.author: arabicalories
stories.one_line_summary: OpenAI shipped GPT-5.5 (Chat Completions and Responses) and GPT-5.5 Pro (Responses only) with 1M context, MCP, web search, computer use, hosted shell, and apply patch.
stories.comment_highlight: throw03172019: Faster than anticipated because of Deepseek release?

stories.title: I cancelled Claude: Token issues, declining quality, and poor support
stories.author: y42
stories.one_line_summary: User cancellation post citing Claude Code session limits and a 32000 output token cap, sparking a 526-comment thread on Pro vs Max-5 tier value and quality regressions.
stories.comment_highlight: wilbur_whateley: Claude with Sonnet medium effort just used 100% of my session limit, some extra dollars, thought for 53 minutes, and said: API Error: Claude's response exceeded the 32000 output token maximum.

stories.title: Show HN: A Karpathy-style LLM wiki your agents maintain (Markdown and Git)
stories.author: najmuzzaman
stories.one_line_summary: Open-source repo (nex-crm/wuphf) implementing Karpathy's tweet-suggested agent memory pattern via plain markdown files versioned with Git, no vector DB, no embeddings.
stories.comment_highlight: mellosouls: Karpathy's original post for context: https://x.com/karpathy/status/2039805659525644595

stories.title: Show HN: Browser Harness - Gives LLM freedom to complete any browser task
stories.author: gregpr07
stories.one_line_summary: browser-use team released Browser Harness - thin loop giving an LLM raw browser primitives, but a top comment surfaces an unaddressed RCE report (GHSA-r2x7-6hq9-qp7v) filed 40 days prior.
stories.comment_highlight: mattaustin: I submitted a remote code execution to the browser-use about 40 days ago. GHSA-r2x7-6hq9-qp7v. I am a bit stunned by the lack of response.

stories.title: Open source memory layer so any AI agent can do what Claude.ai and ChatGPT do
stories.author: alash3al
stories.one_line_summary: Stash - Apache 2.0 memory layer over pg_vector exposed as an MCP server with 28 tools (recall, remember, background consolidation), positioned as drop-in agent memory.
stories.comment_highlight: _pdp_: Digging deeper I can see it is effectively pg_vector plus mcp with two functions: 'recall' and 'remember'. It is effectively a RAG.

stories.title: DeepSeek-V4: Towards Highly Efficient Million-Token Context Intelligence
stories.author: cmrdporcupine
stories.one_line_summary: DeepSeek-V4-Pro weights live on HuggingFace - companion to the headline announcement, providing direct download for self-hosters who want the full 1.6T MoE checkpoint.

stories.title: Tell HN: Claude 4.7 is ignoring stop hooks
stories.author: LatencyKills
stories.one_line_summary: Claude Code 4.7 reportedly bypasses Stop hooks defined in settings.json, preventing user-defined termination logic from firing - multiple users confirming in thread.

stories.title: CC-Canary: Detect early signs of regressions in Claude Code
stories.author: tejpalv
stories.one_line_summary: delta-hq/cc-canary - open-source benchmark harness that runs deterministic Claude Code prompts on a schedule and diffs outputs to flag silent quality regressions.

queries_executed: Algolia search_by_date single-keyword sweep: RAG, retrieval, embedding, vector, MCP, claude, openai, anthropic, agent, llm, ollama, inference, prompt+injection, DeepSeek
frontier_alerts: Coordinated frontier-model release window: DeepSeek V4 (1.6T MoE / 1M context) and OpenAI GPT-5.5 / Pro shipped within ~15h of each other on 2026-04-24. Top commenter framed OpenAI cadence as 'faster than anticipated because of Deepseek release'.
Authority commenter density on DeepSeek thread (simonw + antirez present) confirms it is not hype-only - both verified domain anchors per playbook Section 4.

Browser Harness (rank 6) carries an unpatched RCE disclosure (GHSA-r2x7-6hq9-qp7v) reported 40 days ago - ai_security signal embedded inside a launch story; warrants follow-up if Contexter integrates browser-use.

Multi-thread Claude Code quality narrative: rank 4 (cancellation rant, 888p), rank 9 (Stop hooks broken in 4.7), rank 10 (CC-Canary regression-detector). Three independent posts in 24h = real signal, not single complaint.
